message:
🐛 fix(test): assert on DOM output not render() return (#8286) (#8288)

UpdateIndicator test asserted `expect(container).toBeTruthy()` which
always passes if render() doesn't throw — it doesn't verify the
component actually did the no-update early-return. Replace with
`expect(container.firstChild).toBeNull()` so the assertion catches
regressions where the component unexpectedly renders something on a
no-update response.

Rename the test to reflect what it actually checks.

Addresses Copilot review in #8286 (comment on merged #8283).

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
